title: Energy-Partition Tension Spline for Swap-Curve Construction (reference implementation)
description: Reference implementation accompanying the paper 'Swap Curve Construction and Optimization of the Tension Parameter: An Energy-Partition Formulation' (A. Sinha). Reproduces all results: the bending-energy fraction phi(sigma) and equipartition optimum, closed-form energies, hedge-locality analysis, forward-space and multi-curve SOFR/OIS constructions, analytic risk Jacobians and sigma* stability, and even-handed benchmarks against Hagan-West, Smith-Wilson, log-discount and piecewise-flat forwards. Includes a module to fit the criterion to live FRED / U.S. Treasury data over arbitrary historical windows. All empirical results use the real 22-May-2026 U.S. Treasury par-yield curve; no data are simulated.
